creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text: There is Mk/Uses/gssapi.mk, yet Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk does not handle gssapi=none|base|mit|heimdal. This forces ports users for Uses=gssapi to configure every single port for MIT or something else instead of doing DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=gssapi=mit in make.conf. I consider gssapi=base is a sane default.
